ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity (e.g., Austria, United States) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., country, region) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the entity */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the entity's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the entity's location */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the entity */,
  "region" TEXT /* Larger region or continent the entity belongs to */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., WHO, CDC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which data is collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the date */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the date */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the date */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number of the year */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the date is a weekend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (country or region) for which data is collected */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date for which data is collected */,
  "daily_tests" INTEGER /* Number of daily tests conducted */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths attributed to COVID-19 */,
  "cumulative_tests" TEXT /* Cumulative number of tests conducted */,
  "cumulative_cases" TEXT /* Cumulative number of cases reported */,
  "cumulative_deaths" TEXT /* Cumulative number of deaths */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Vaccination rate of the population */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., WHO, CDC) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (country or region) for which data is accessed */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date for which data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific data point accessed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point for which version is tracked */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for better tracking */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
